entities.name: SODICITY-INDUCED SOIL DEGRADATION
entities.description: Environmental constraint with severe negative impacts on agricultural productivity and sustainability in arid and semiarid regions

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output, negatively impacted by sodicity-induced soil degradation

entities.name: SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The capacity to maintain agricultural productivity over the long term

entities.name: ARID AND SEMIARID REGIONS
entities.description: Geographic areas where sodicity-induced soil degradation is a major environmental constraint

entities.name: SALT-AFFECTED SOILS
entities.description: A broad category of soils that includes sodic and saline-sodic soils

entities.name: SODIC SOILS
entities.description: Soils characterized by excess sodium ions and structural problems like slaking and swelling

entities.name: SODIUM IONS
entities.description: Na+ ions that occur in excess in the soil solution and cation exchange complex of sodic soils

entities.name: CATION EXCHANGE COMPLEX
entities.description: The part of the soil where sodium ions accumulate in sodic soils

entities.name: SLAKING, SWELLING, AND DISPERSION OF CLAY
entities.description: Physical processes that cause structural problems in sodic soils

entities.name: SURFACE CRUSTING AND HARDSETTING
entities.description: Specific soil conditions resulting from physical processes in sodic soils

entities.name: SALINE-SODIC SOILS
entities.description: Salt-affected soils that share common properties and management approaches with sodic soils

entities.name: IRRIGATION SCHEMES
entities.description: Systems for water delivery where the extent of sodic and saline-sodic soils has increased

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: The use of sodic and saline-sodic soils as a resource for growing crops

entities.name: GLOBAL FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The challenge of ensuring food availability, which requires improving sodic and saline-sodic soils

entities.name: PHYTOREMEDIATION
entities.description: The use of plants to improve and remediate sodic and saline-sodic soils

relationships.target: SLAKING, SWELLING, AND DISPERSION OF CLAY

relationships.source: SLAKING, SWELLING, AND DISPERSION OF CLAY
